chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos. 1357 & 1362 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For orders as to non-prosecution. -------------- 11.02.2025. Mr. Javed Hussain holding brief for Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for Applicant in SCRA No. 1357/2015. Mr. Aamir Raza, Advocate for Applicant in SCRA No. 1362/2015. ------------ Matter is pending in non-prosecution as no compliance has been made since 2016. Accordingly these Reference Applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office to place copy of this order in the connected Reference Application. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
